name: Pizza Sauce#1
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the tomato paste, garlic (chopped), water, oregano, cooking oil, marjoram, black pepper, basil, instant minced onion, brown sugar, and grated Parmesan cheese in a 1 quart saucepan.
2. Cook the mixture for 30-40 minutes until it thickens slightly.
3. The sauce will make enough to serve four pizzas of approximately 12 inches each.
